titleStmt.title: SII 26.517: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 517. (A.R. No. 490 of 1909.) ŚŌḺAPURAM, SIVAGANGA TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Inner gōpura of the same temple, left of entrance.

p.hi: Tribhº Emmaṇḍº Kulaśēkharadēva: Year 36, Mārgaḻi = 1303-04 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records a decision arrived at by the Ūr and kāraṇavar of Śōḻapuram in Āṇmā-nāḍu, and those of Muḍivaḻaṅgupāṇḍyaṉ, Kuṉṟattūr, Iraṇḍusollādāṉ Śēturāmakuṟuchchi, Śāmantakaṇḍan Vīrasiṅganallūr and Pāṇḍyadēvakuruchchi. It related to the gift of a kāṇi (1/80) of paṇam on every sari (puḍavai) sold by them and by those from other places, to provide for the repairs to the temple of the god Vikramapāṇḍīśvaramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Śōḻapuram.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅkoṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulacekaradevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 6 vatu mārkaḻimātam Āṇmānāṭṭu coḻapurattu Uṭaiyār vikramapāṇṭiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tiruppaṇikku Ivvūr kaṇṇuṭaip
perur tecavuḷḷiṭṭa Ūrum kāraṇavomum muṭivaḻaṅku pāṇṭiyaṉil Ūrum kāraṇavomuḻutumāyka kuṭiyuḷḷiṭṭa Ūrum kāraṇavomum kuṉṟattūr Iraṇṭu collātāṉ ceturāmakuṟucci cāmanta kaṇṭaṉ viraciṅkanallūr pāṇṭiyatevakuṟicci Ivvūrkaḷil Ūrum kāraṇa
vomum Emmilicaintu Innāyaṉāṟkku nāṅkaḷ vikkum puṭavaiyuruvoṉṟukku kāṇippaṇamāka vaittu puṟavūrkaḷile niṉṟu vantu vikkum mavarkaḷu Ippaṇam kuṭuppatāka cammatittu Itu candrātittavaṟ celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭuvittuk kuṭuttom Ivvūr
kaḷomum kāṇiyaromum Uṭaiyār vikramapāṇṭiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku Ivai vaḻutikoṉ Eḻuttu pāṇṭikkoṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Aḷakaikkoṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaḷavakoṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cuntaraceṇṭilairāmaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tamiḻkoṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tevāṉkoṉ Eḻuttu IvaiIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.517 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
